basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: CUSAT is recruiting 01 Technical Assistant Grade III on contract for the Department of Chemical Oceanography. Candidates with M.Sc. in Hydrochemistry/Chemistry and relevant experience can apply.

age_limit.details: 18 - 40 Years as on 01.01.2026 (usual age relaxation for reserved categories).

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 18 - 40 Years (relaxation for Backward communities and SC/ST candidates) | other conditions: Engagement from July to April with breaks during May-June vacation months
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Hydrochemistry /Chemistry or equivalent with two years experience in Research/Analytical Lab

selection_process: The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates on the basis of marks obtained in the qualifying degree. Shortlisting will be done as per merit and the number of applications received. Selection will be as per University rules
and Syndicate decisions. The tenure of appointment on contract will be as decided by the University from time to time. The appointment conditions of service
emoluments and other service benefits shall be governed by the provisions of K.S.R
Act/ Statutes/ Ordinances and Syndicate decisions of CUSAT as amended from time to time.
how_to_apply: Online Application: Interested candidates may apply online through the website of CUSAT at recruit.cusat.ac.in on or before 17 August 2026. Fill all required fields carefully, upload necessary documents, and submit the form. Keep a printout for future reference.

Hard Copy Submission: Take the printout of the online filled application. Attach self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents including proof of age, educational qualifications, experience certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), and any other relevant testimonials.

Sending the Application: Send the complete application package by registered/speed post to: The Registrar, Administrative Office, Cochin University of Science and Technology, Kochi-22 Superscription on the envelope: “Application for the post of Technical Assistant Grade III, Department of Chemical Oceanography on contract basis”. The hard copy must reach on or before 24 August 2026.
Important Note: Late and defective applications will be summarily rejected. Ensure all documents are complete and self-attested to avoid disqualification.
important_instructions: The appointment is on contract basis and governed by CUSAT rules. Technical Assistants will be engaged from July to April with breaks during May-June vacation months. Reservation rules of the state are applicable. The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifying degree marks. The tenure and service conditions will be as decided by the University from time to time.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Cochin University of Science and Technology invites applications for engagement of Technical Assistant Grade III on contract basis in the Department of Chemical Oceanography. The appointment is initially for one year and may be extended to two years. Reservation rules are applicable. Download CUSAT Technical Assistant Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: CUSAT is recruiting 01 Technical Assistant Grade III on contract for the Department of Chemical Oceanography. Candidates with M.Sc. in Hydrochemistry/Chemistry and relevant experience can apply.

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: 18 - 40 Years as on 01.01.2026 (usual age relaxation for reserved categories).

content_sections.heading: CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates on the basis of marks obtained in the qualifying degree. Shortlisting will be done as per merit and the number of applications received. Selection will be as per University rules, reservation norms of the state, and Syndicate decisions. The tenure of appointment on contract will be as decided by the University from time to time. The appointment conditions of service, emoluments and other service benefits shall be governed by the provisions of K.S.R, K.S & S.S.R, Act/ Statutes/ Ordinances and Syndicate decisions of CUSAT as amended from time to time.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Online Application: Interested candidates may apply online through the website of CUSAT at recruit.cusat.ac.in on or before 17 August 2026. Fill all required fields carefully, upload necessary documents, and submit the form. Keep a printout for future reference. Hard Copy Submission: Take the printout of the online filled application. Attach self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents including proof of age, educational qualifications, experience certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), and any other relevant testimonials. Sending the Application: Send the complete application package by registered/speed post to: The Registrar, Administrative Office, Cochin University of Science and Technology, Kochi-22 Superscription on the envelope: “Application for the post of Technical Assistant Grade III, Department of Chemical Oceanography on contract basis”. The hard copy must reach on or before 24 August 2026. Important Note: Late and defective applications will be summarily rejected. Ensure all documents are complete and self-attested to avoid disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The appointment is on contract basis and governed by CUSAT rules. Technical Assistants will be engaged from July to April with breaks during May-June vacation months. Reservation rules of the state are applicable. The University reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifying degree marks. The tenure and service conditions will be as decided by the University from time to time.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Technical Assistant Grade III at CUSAT?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy in the Department of Chemical Oceanography.

faq.question: Q3. What is the consolidated pay for Technical Assistant Grade III at CUSAT?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay is ₹41,970/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for CUSAT Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Hydrochemistry /Chemistry or equivalent with two years experience in Research/Analytical Lab.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III recruitment?
faq.answer: 18 - 40 Years as on 01.01.2026 (with relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for CUSAT Technical Assistant Grade III vacancy?
faq.answer: Apply online at recruit.cusat.ac.in by 17 August 2026 and send hard copy by post to the Registrar by 24 August 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is experience mandatory for the Technical Assistant position at CUSAT?
faq.answer: Yes, two years experience in Research/Analytical Lab is required.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are needed for CUSAT Technical Assistant application?
faq.answer: Self-attested photocopies of documents proving age, qualification, and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Technical Assistant Grade III position at CUSAT permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is on contract basis initially for one year, extendable up to two years.

faq.question: Q10. In which department is the Technical Assistant Grade III post at CUSAT?
faq.answer: Department of Chemical Oceanography.
